skills.name: jira-ingestion
skills.description: Fetch Jira tickets via Atlassian MCP, normalize to local YAML, download attachments, auto-detect contradictions

skills.name: contradiction-detection
skills.description: LLM analysis of ticket description vs comments to detect requirement contradictions

skills.name: project-profile-loader
skills.description: Load project-level rules.yml for git conventions, QA format, dev commands, and MCP config

skills.name: qa-handover-generator
skills.description: Generate structured QA handover notes with test scenarios, regression risks, and screenshots

skills.name: confluence-lookup
skills.description: Search Confluence for pages related to active task with relevance scoring

skills.name: bitbucket-pr-workflow
skills.description: Create PRs from active task with structured description, pipeline checks, and Jira linking

skills.name: azure-devops-pipeline
skills.description: Query Azure DevOps pipeline status, trigger runs, and parse test results

skills.name: bulk-ingestion
skills.description: Batch ingest tickets from Jira board or filter URL with contradiction detection

skills.name: session-handoff-herold
skills.description: Save active task context for cross-session continuity

commands.name: task-ingest
commands.description: Ingest Jira tickets into local task storage

commands.name: task-list
commands.description: List locally stored tasks with status and contradiction count

commands.name: task-start
commands.description: Set a task as active and load its context

commands.name: task-done
commands.description: Complete the active task with QA handover

commands.name: task-status
commands.description: Show current active task details and progress

commands.name: task-ingest-bulk
commands.description: Batch ingest tickets from a Jira board or filter URL

commands.name: task-pr
commands.description: Create a PR from the active task context

commands.name: task-docs
commands.description: Search related Confluence docs for the active task
